title: Epipactis kuenkeleana
intro: Epipactis kuenkeleana, also known as Kuenkele's helleborine, is a species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and boost the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Epipactis kuenkeleana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, this plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as tea or tinctures, to treat respiratory infections and promote overall well-being.
